Politics.headline: Trump Threatens to Quit NATO
Politics.detail: US President Donald Trump held high-stakes talks with NATO chief Mark Rutte Wednesday, with the White House saying he would discuss the possibility of leaving the alliance after it failed to join the Iran war; Trump was also considering punishing some NATO members he believed were unhelpful during the conflict by moving US troops out of their countries.

Politics.headline: Dispute Over Cease-fire
Politics.detail: The day-old cease-fire between the United States and Iran was being tested on Wednesday by uncertainty over the status of the economically vital Strait of Hormuz and disagreement over whether the truce applied to Lebanon, where Israel continued to carry out punishing attacks; Iran accused the United States of not upholding its end of the deal, stating that Washington had to choose between a cease-fire or continued war via Israel, and “cannot have both.”

Politics.headline: Al Jazeera Journalists Killed
Politics.detail: Al Jazeera journalist Mohammed Wishah has been killed in an Israeli drone strike in the Gaza Strip; Wishah, a correspondent in Gaza for Al Jazeera Mubasher, was killed on Wednesday after the attack hit a car he was traveling in on al-Rashid Street, the coastal road that runs west of Gaza City.

Politics.headline: Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Mao Ning's Regular Press Conference on April 9, 2026
Politics.detail: China's Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Mao Ning addressed questions on various topics, including China's stance on the Israel-Lebanon conflict and the temporary ceasefire arrangement, reiterating the need for de-escalation and resolution through political and diplomatic means; Mao Ning also announced that President Xi Jinping's Special Envoy will attend the inauguration of President Min Aung Hlaing in Myanmar.
Politics.source: Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the People's Republic of China

Politics.headline: Bobby Pulido brings congressional campaign to quinceañeras
Politics.detail: Tejano music star Bobby Pulido, a Democrat running for Congress in South Texas, has been attending quinceañeras in an effort to reach new voters; this unconventional approach was inspired by his Republican opponent's remark that the election “isn't about who you want performing at your niece's quinceañera.”

Finance & Economy.headline: India caps refinery margins after windfall export tax to cushion fuel losses
Finance & Economy.detail: To offset fuel losses, India has capped refinery margins following the implementation of a windfall export tax.

Finance & Economy.headline: Give all UK households a set amount of subsidised energy, says thinktank
Finance & Economy.detail: A think tank is suggesting that all households in the UK should receive a fixed amount of subsidized energy.

Finance & Economy.headline: US Stock Market Today | Dow Jones | Nasdaq Live: US stock futures fall over shaky Mideast truce; inflation in focus
Finance & Economy.detail: U.S. stock futures are declining due to an unstable truce in the Middle East, with inflation also remaining a key point of concern.

Finance & Economy.headline: US economy expands at 0.5% pace in latest fourth-quarter report figures.
Finance & Economy.detail: The U.S. economy has shown a growth rate of 0.5% in the most recent figures from the fourth-quarter report.

Finance & Economy.headline: U.S. Treasurys aren't selling like they used to.
Finance & Economy.detail: There is a change in the trends of how U.S. Treasury bonds are being sold.

Technology.headline: Microsoft Mysteriously Freezes Accounts for VeraCrypt, WireGuard, Windscribe
Technology.detail: Several users have reported their Microsoft accounts being inexplicably frozen when using services like VeraCrypt, WireGuard, and Windscribe, leaving them locked out of their accounts with little explanation.

Technology.headline: WhatsApp Rolls Out New CarPlay Features for All Users
Technology.detail: WhatsApp has released new CarPlay features to all users, which includes an improved interface and dedicated tabs for call history, favorites, and chats.

Technology.headline: Asus Raises RX 9070 XT Prices By Up to 17.5% Overnight
Technology.detail: Asus has increased the prices of its RX 9070 XT graphics cards by as much as 17.5% unexpectedly.

Technology.headline: YouTube Shorts 'AI Avatars' Easily Adds Your Face, Voice To Videos Via Live Selfie
Technology.detail: AI avatars on YouTube Shorts now look and sound like the users, allowing everyone to easily add themselves to videos via Live Selfie.

Technology.headline: US Warns That Iranian Hackers Are Targeting Water, Energy Sectors
Technology.detail: The FBI and NSA have issued a warning that Iranian-connected hackers are focusing on vulnerable programmable logic controllers used in industrial processes within the water and energy sectors.

Science.headline: Your Brain Can Trick You Into Liking Artificial Sweeteners
Science.detail: Research indicates that the brain might decide what tastes good even before a person consumes it. This suggests our perceptions of taste could be influenced by cognitive processes before any sensory experience occurs.

Science.headline: Scientists Discover Hidden Gut Trigger Behind ALS and Dementia
Science.detail: A recent study has revealed that gut bacteria might have a crucial role in initiating amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS) and frontotemporal dementia. Harmful sugars produced by these microbes can trigger immune responses that damage the brain.

Science.headline: This Is How Ovarian Cancer Spreads Before Doctors Can Detect
Science.detail: A newly identified interaction between ovarian cancer cells and surrounding abdominal cells helps explain the spread of ovarian cancer before it can be detected by doctors.

Science.headline: Scientists Discover Hidden Virus Linked to Colorectal Cancer
Science.detail: A newly identified virus may be linked to colorectal cancer, which ranks among the most diagnosed cancers worldwide.

Science.headline: Hidden Danger: Widely Used Pesticides Linked to 150% Higher Cancer Risk
Science.detail: Researchers have found a connection between widespread pesticide exposure and an increased risk of cancer, which is caused by subtle effects on the human body.

Health.headline: Veterans Often Miss Out on Quadruple Therapy for HFrEF
Health.detail: Many veterans with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (HFrEF) are not receiving the recommended quadruple therapy, highlighting a gap in care. This suggests potential areas for improvement in treatment strategies for this population.

Health.headline: Real-World Data Show Avacopan Safety Signals in Vasculitis
Health.detail: Real-world data is revealing safety signals for avacopan in the treatment of vasculitis, providing valuable insights beyond clinical trials. These findings emphasize the importance of ongoing monitoring and evaluation of medication safety in diverse patient populations.

Health.headline: Consider Kids' Sports Gear as a Source of Contact Dermatitis
Health.detail: Sports equipment used by children can be a source of contact dermatitis, a skin irritation caused by allergens or irritants. It is important to consider this potential source when diagnosing skin issues in young athletes.

Health.headline: How Is Cystic Echinococcosis Diagnosed and Managed?
Health.detail: Cystic echinococcosis diagnosis and management are being discussed, offering insights into the approach to this parasitic disease. This information is valuable for healthcare professionals involved in the care of patients with this condition.

Health.headline: Minority Families Describe Barriers to Pediatric Derm Care
Health.detail: A recent study highlights that minority families face multiple barriers when trying to access pediatric dermatology care. These barriers can impact the health and well-being of children in these communities.

Sports.headline: Soler, López suspended seven games for sparking Braves-Angels brawl
Sports.detail: Angels designated hitter Jorge Soler and Braves pitcher Reynaldo López have been suspended for seven games following a brawl during Tuesday night's game. The suspensions highlight the tensions running high early in the MLB season.

Sports.headline: Holmgren scores 30, Thunder clinch NBA's best regular-season record in 128-110 victory over Clippers
Sports.detail: Chet Holmgren scored 30 points as the Oklahoma City Thunder secured the NBA's best regular-season record with a 128-110 victory over the Los Angeles Clippers. The Thunder's impressive performance solidifies their position as a top contender heading into the playoffs.

Sports.headline: Davey Lopes, four-time All-Star and one of MLB's greatest base stealers, dead at 80
Sports.detail: Davey Lopes, a four-time All-Star and renowned base stealer in MLB, has passed away at the age of 80. Lopes was known for his contributions to the Los Angeles Dodgers, where he was part of a celebrated infield.

Sports.headline: Falcons right tackle Kaleb McGary announces retirement after missing 2025 season with injury
Sports.detail: Kaleb McGary, the Atlanta Falcons' right tackle, has announced his retirement from the NFL after missing the 2025 season due to injury. His departure creates a need for the Falcons to find a replacement on their offensive line.

Sports.headline: Flames vs. Avalanche: Watch for free Thursday on 9NEWS
Sports.detail: The Colorado Avalanche, having clinched the Central Division and top seed in the Western Conference, aim for the President's Trophy for home-ice playoff advantage as they face the Calgary Flames.  The game is available to watch for free on 9NEWS.

Entertainment.headline: K-pop star Heeseung begins solo chapter under new name Evan following exit from boy band Enhypen
Entertainment.detail: Heeseung, formerly of Enhypen, is starting his solo career under the new stage name Evan.

Entertainment.headline: BTS launches world tour in South Korea
Entertainment.detail: BTS is commencing their highly anticipated world tour with a concert near Seoul, marking their return to the stage after almost four years.

Entertainment.headline: Actress Tori Spelling hospitalized after Southern California crash
Entertainment.detail: Tori Spelling was involved in a two-car crash in Temecula and was hospitalized as a result.

Entertainment.headline: Ketamine Queen Sentenced to 15 Years in Prison for Matthew Perry's Death
Entertainment.detail: Jasveen Sangha received a 15-year sentence after pleading guilty to charges related to Matthew Perry's death in August 2025.

Entertainment.headline: Dhurandhar 2 enters world's top 10 highest-grossing films of 2026; mints $178M
Entertainment.detail: Dhurandhar 2 has become one of the top 10 highest-grossing films of 2026, earning $178 million.

Crime & Justice.headline: Peru's Elections Need International Attention
Crime & Justice.detail: As Peru heads into general elections, its democratic backsliding, including the weakening of courts and institutions, requires urgent international attention, particularly regarding accountability for members of Congress facing criminal investigations. Congress has undermined the independence of courts and prosecutors, potentially limiting accountability for its members.

Crime & Justice.headline: Defence Secretary No9 speech - 09 April 2026
Crime & Justice.detail: The UK is increasing efforts to defend its undersea network, which is a prime target for adversaries, by providing an extra £100 million for P8 submarine hunting aircraft and launching the Atlantic Bastion programme. The Defence Secretary revealed details of recent Russian military operation and called out this activity, emphasizing any attempt to damage undersea cables and pipelines will not be tolerated.

Crime & Justice.headline: Wave of alleged migrant murders ignites fury across US as officials warn of more carnage, crackdown needed
Crime & Justice.detail: A series of killings across the U.S. involving suspects in the country illegally is driving renewed outrage and calls for sweeping policy changes. Officials are warning of more potential violence and are calling for a crackdown.

Crime & Justice.headline: Hawaii doctor accused of trying to kill his wife convicted of attempted manslaughter
Crime & Justice.detail: A doctor in Hawaii was found guilty of attempted manslaughter for trying to kill his wife during a hike. The jury reached the verdict on Wednesday, finding him guilty based on extreme mental or emotional disturbance.

Crime & Justice.headline: Tennessee high court blocks order allowing media witnesses to view more parts of executions
Crime & Justice.detail: The Tennessee Supreme Court has blocked a lower court order that would have allowed media witnesses to view more parts of executions. This decision limits media access to the execution process.

Education.headline: US Department of Education and US Department of Labor Announce First Grant Competitions Under Elementary and Secondary Education Partnership
Education.detail: The U.S. Departments of Education and Labor issued the Fiscal Year 2026 competitions for the Teacher and School Leader Incentive Program and the Innovative Approaches to Literacy Program.

Education.headline: U.S. Secretary of Education Linda McMahon Visited Colman-Egan High School
Education.detail: U.S. Secretary of Education Linda McMahon visited Colman-Egan High School and the McCrossan Boy's Ranch in support of her Returning Education to the States Tour and the Flandreau Indian School in support of the History Rocks Tour!

Education.headline: What's Your Educator Wellness Score? Here's How to Find Out
Education.detail: Educator wellness is increasingly recognized as a critical factor in teacher retention and student success, prompting a need for tools to assess and improve it.

Education.headline: Minnesota districts ask judge to restore limits on immigration enforcement near schools.
Education.detail: Two Minnesota school districts and the state's main teachers union have asked a federal judge to block a Trump administration change in policy that gave immigration authorities a freer hand to conduct enforcement actions in and near schools.

Education.headline: Open image caption. Canva. School & District Management What's Your Educator Wellness Score? Here's How to Find Out.

Lifestyle.headline: Hyrox, the global fitness race, draws 8,000 athletes to Bengaluru
Lifestyle.detail: The Hyrox fitness race saw 8,000 athletes participate in Bengaluru, showcasing the growing popularity of fitness events.

Lifestyle.headline: Women reveal surprising effects of being bald: 'It's a luxury'
Lifestyle.detail: Women are sharing the unexpected benefits and freedoms they've experienced after choosing to shave their heads.

Lifestyle.headline: He swapped his lawn for native plants after asking, 'What was meant to be here?'
Lifestyle.detail: A homeowner replaced their traditional lawn with native plants to promote biodiversity and conserve water.

Lifestyle.headline: Kunal Kapoor shares 2-ingredient apple-cinnamon jam recipe cooked in a microwave
Lifestyle.detail: Chef Kunal Kapoor shares a simple recipe for apple-cinnamon jam that can be quickly made in a microwave.

Lifestyle.headline: Blink and you'll miss Kate Middleton's teeny-tiny $450 handbag at the Royal Family's Easter celebration
Lifestyle.detail: Kate Middleton was seen with a small $450 handbag at the Royal Family's Easter celebration.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Opinion: Colorado lawmakers had a chance to protect homes from wildfires, but turned it down
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Colorado lawmakers rejected House Bill 1310, which would have shifted a fraction of wildfire funding toward home hardening and defensible space grants, despite evidence showing this strategy effectively protects homes. The bill did not defund other wildfire strategies but aimed to protect ecosystems and homes by learning to live within the landscape.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Editorial: Stop accepting terrorist immigrants
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The editorial discusses a Michigan man's attack on a Jewish school and argues that it highlights the enemy America faces, referencing a Dearborn man who expressed his desire to kill as many Jewish children as possible. It also mentions an immigrant from Lebanon who was naturalized and whose brother was a commander in Hezbollah.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: What the Gulf fears most is an inconclusive end to the Iran war
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The author argues that a temporary ceasefire in the Iran war, while potentially satisfying Washington's political timetable, would sow instability across the region and the world. They emphasize that the key question is whether the war truly ends by resolving the sources of instability, rather than just a pause that allows Iran to maintain its capacity for coercion.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: How Trump could still get a strategic win from the Iran war
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The article posits that despite Trump's claim that Operation Epic Fury hasn't produced regime change, the internal issues within Iran could lead to either a reformist government or complete collapse. The author suggests that ending the war quickly, provided the Strait of Hormuz is open and enriched uranium is removed, might accelerate that process and lead to a strategic win for Trump.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Opinion: Don't dismantle the Office of Health Strategy
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The author argues against dismantling the Office of Health Strategy (OHS) in Connecticut, stating that it would endanger healthcare access and equity. They express concern that dissolving the OHS and returning to a multi-agency approach would allow profit-driven healthcare corporations to shape healthcare without proper oversight.

World.headline: Middle East ceasefire in jeopardy after Israel's strikes on Lebanon
World.detail: A fragile Iran-US ceasefire is threatened by Israeli attacks on Lebanon, raising fears of a broader regional conflict.

World.headline: Trump says US forces to stay near Iran, ready for 'next conquest'
World.detail: Despite a ceasefire agreement, former U.S. President Trump stated that U.S. forces will remain near Iran, prepared for further action.

World.headline: Several people reported killed in fresh Israeli attacks on Lebanon.
World.detail: Multiple fatalities have been reported as a result of recent Israeli attacks in Lebanon, adding to regional tensions.

World.headline: US-Iran talks in Pakistan: Who's attending, what's on the agenda?
World.detail: Discussions between the U.S. and Iran are scheduled to take place in Pakistan, with key agenda items to be addressed by the attending delegates.

World.headline: Russian drone damages infrastructure, vessel at Ukraine's largest Danube port
World.detail: A Russian drone strike has caused damage to infrastructure and a vessel located at Ukraine's largest port on the Danube River.

Zimbabwe.headline: Chiefs, church vow to fight social ills
Zimbabwe.detail: Traditional leaders and the church have pledged to collaborate in combating societal problems.

Zimbabwe.headline: Contraceptive push prevents unsafe abortions, maternal deaths
Zimbabwe.detail: Efforts to promote contraception are credited with reducing the incidence of unsafe abortions and maternal mortality.

Zimbabwe.headline: Presidential amnesty beneficiary arrested three times
Zimbabwe.detail: A person who benefited from the presidential amnesty has been arrested on three separate occasions.

Zimbabwe.headline: Teacher steals from Eswatini delegate
Zimbabwe.detail: A teacher has been accused of stealing from a delegate from Eswatini.

Zimbabwe.headline: 30 killed in Easter holiday road accidents
Zimbabwe.detail: Thirty people have died in road accidents during the Easter holiday period.
